summary: Enabled SSR (ssr: true) so HTML is server-rendered. Added i18n/experimental.localeDetector pointing to i18n/locale-detector.ts: Nitro Intlify middleware now resolves locale as route prefix, then cookie bergamota_i18n_redirected (must match detectBrowserLanguage.cookieKey in nuxt.config.ts), then Accept-Language via findBrowserLocale, then fallback. Fixes prior mismatch where default detector read i18n_redirected. Build verified (nuxt build).

outputs.cookie_sync_note: i18n/locale-detector.ts COOKIE_KEY must stay identical to i18n.detectBrowserLanguage.cookieKey in nuxt.config.ts
